roles.name: Acrobat
roles.summary: Each night*, choose a player: if they are drunk or poisoned tonight, you die.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择一名玩家。若其今夜醉酒或中毒，你死亡。
roles.detail: Choose one player each night after the first. If that player is drunk or poisoned during that night, the Acrobat dies.
roles.chineseDetail: 杂技演员 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Alchemist
roles.summary: You have a Minion ability. When using this, the Minion you copied is not in play.
roles.chineseSummary: 你拥有一个不在场爪牙的能力。
roles.detail: The Storyteller grants the Alchemist a Minion ability from a Minion not in play. Record the chosen Minion ability in the app.
roles.chineseDetail: 炼金术士 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Alsaahir
roles.summary: Each day, if you publicly guess which players are Minion(s) and which are Demon(s), good wins.
roles.chineseSummary: 每天：若你公开准确指出哪些玩家是爪牙、哪些玩家是恶魔，善良阵营获胜。
roles.detail: If the Alsaahir publicly names every evil player as Minion or Demon during the day, good wins immediately.
roles.chineseDetail: 阿尔萨希尔 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Amnesiac
roles.summary: You do not know what your ability is. Each day, discover how it works.
roles.chineseSummary: 你不知道自己的能力。每天逐步摸索它如何运作。
roles.detail: The Amnesiac does not know their ability. Use storyteller notes to record rulings or hints as the game progresses.
roles.chineseDetail: 失忆者 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Atheist
roles.summary: Experimental Townsfolk. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 无神论者：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Townsfolk is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 无神论者 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Balloonist
roles.summary: Each night, you learn a player of a different character type than last night. [+0 or +1 Outsider]
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：得知一名玩家，且其角色类型与昨夜不同。[+0 或 +1 外来者]
roles.detail: Each night, the Storyteller shows you a player of a different character type than the last one shown. During setup, add zero or one Outsider.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚说书人会指出一名玩家，且其角色类型必须与前一晚展示的不同。开局时额外加入 0 或 1 名外来者。

roles.name: Banshee
roles.summary: If the Demon kills you, all players learn this. From now on, you may nominate twice per day and vote twice per nomination.
roles.chineseSummary: 若恶魔杀死你，所有玩家都会知道。从此你每天可提名两次，每轮提名可投两票。
roles.detail: If the Demon kills the Banshee, everybody learns this. While dead, the Banshee may nominate twice per day and vote twice per nomination.
roles.chineseDetail: 女妖 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Bounty Hunter
roles.summary: You start knowing 1 evil player. If the player you know dies, you learn another evil player tonight. [1 Townsfolk is evil]
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：得知 1 名邪恶玩家。若你已知的那名玩家死亡，你今夜会得知另一名邪恶玩家。[1 名镇民为邪恶]
roles.detail: First night: learn one evil player. Whenever the evil player you know dies, you learn another evil player that night. During setup, one Townsfolk becomes evil.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜得知 1 名邪恶玩家。若你已知的那名邪恶玩家死亡，则你当夜会得知另一名邪恶玩家。开局时有 1 名镇民会被改为邪恶阵营。

roles.name: Cannibal
roles.summary: Experimental Townsfolk. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 食人者：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Townsfolk is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 食人者 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Choirboy
roles.summary: If the Demon kills the King, you learn which player is the Demon. [+ the King]
roles.chineseSummary: 若恶魔杀死国王，你会得知哪名玩家是恶魔。[+国王]
roles.detail: If the King dies to the Demon, the Choirboy learns which player is the Demon that night.
roles.chineseDetail: 唱诗班男孩 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Cult Leader
roles.summary: Each night, you become the alignment of an alive neighbor. If all good players choose to join your cult, your team wins.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：你变为一名存活邻座的阵营。若所有善良玩家都加入你的邪教，你的阵营获胜。
roles.detail: At the end of each night, if both living neighbors share an alignment, the Cult Leader becomes that alignment. During the day, a cult vote can win for the Cult Leader's current team.
roles.chineseDetail: 邪教领袖 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Engineer
roles.summary: Once per game, at night, choose which Minions or which Demon is in play.
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次，夜里：选择本局有哪些爪牙，或是哪种恶魔在场。
roles.detail: Once per game at night, choose either a new Demon role for the current Demon player, or a complete replacement set of Minion roles for the living Minions.
roles.chineseDetail: 工程师 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Farmer
roles.summary: When you die at night, an alive good player becomes a Farmer.
roles.chineseSummary: 若你夜里死亡，一名存活善良玩家成为新的农夫。
roles.detail: If the Farmer dies at night, a living good player becomes the Farmer and learns this. Ongoing effects of their old role end immediately.
roles.chineseDetail: 农夫 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Fisherman
roles.summary: Once per game, during the day, visit the Storyteller for some advice to help your team win.
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次，白天：向说书人寻求一条帮助你阵营获胜的建议。
roles.detail: Once per game during the day, record the storyteller's strategic advice for the Fisherman.
roles.chineseDetail: 渔夫 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: General
roles.summary: Each night, you learn which alignment the Storyteller believes is winning: good, evil, or neither.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：得知说书人认为当前占优的阵营是善良、邪恶或都不是。
roles.detail: Each night, the Storyteller indicates whether good, evil, or neither appears to be winning at that moment.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚由说书人判断当前局势更偏向善良、邪恶或都不明显占优，并告知将军。

roles.name: High Priestess
roles.summary: Each night, learn which player the Storyteller believes you should talk to most.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：得知说书人认为你最该去交谈的玩家。
roles.detail: Each night, the Storyteller indicates which player the High Priestess should talk to most. This is usually the player whose discussion would help good most.
roles.chineseDetail: 女祭司 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Huntsman
roles.summary: Once per game, at night, choose a living player: the Damsel, if chosen, becomes a not-in-play Townsfolk. [+ the Damsel]
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次，夜里：选择一名存活玩家。若其是少女，则其变成一个不在场镇民。[+少女]
roles.detail: Once per game, the Huntsman may choose a living player at night. If it is the Damsel, that player becomes a not-in-play Townsfolk.
roles.chineseDetail: 猎人 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: King
roles.summary: Each night, if the dead equal or outnumber the living, you learn 1 alive character. The Demon knows you are the King.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：若死者不少于生者，得知 1 个存活角色。恶魔知道你是国王。
roles.detail: Once the dead equal or outnumber the living, the King learns one alive character each night. The Demon starts knowing who the King is.
roles.chineseDetail: 国王 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Knight
roles.summary: You start knowing 2 players that are not the Demon.
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：得知 2 名不是恶魔的玩家。
roles.detail: First night only. Learn two players who are not the Demon.
roles.chineseDetail: 骑士 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Lycanthrope
roles.summary: Each night*, choose an alive player. If good, they die & the Demon does not kill tonight. One good player registers as evil.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择一名存活玩家。若其为善良，则其死亡，且恶魔今夜不杀人；另有 1 名善良玩家会被登记为邪恶。
roles.detail: On nights after the first, choose one alive player. If they are good, they die and the Demon does not kill that night. If they are evil, no Lycanthrope kill happens.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚选择一名存活玩家。若其为善良，则其死亡，且当夜恶魔的击杀被阻断；若其为邪恶，则狼人本身不造成击杀。

roles.name: Magician
roles.summary: Experimental Townsfolk. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 魔术师：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Townsfolk is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 魔术师 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Nightwatchman
roles.summary: Once per game, at night, choose a player: they learn you are the Nightwatchman.
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次，夜里：选择一名玩家，其得知你是守夜人。
roles.detail: Once per game at night, choose a player. That player is shown that you are the Nightwatchman.
roles.chineseDetail: 每局一次，夜里指定一名玩家；该玩家会被告知你就是守夜人。

roles.name: Noble
roles.summary: You start knowing 3 players, 1 and only 1 of which is evil.
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：得知 3 名玩家，其中恰有 1 名是邪恶。
roles.detail: First night only. Learn three players with exactly one evil among them.
roles.chineseDetail: 贵族 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Pixie
roles.summary: You start knowing 1 in-play Townsfolk character. If you are mad that you are this character, you gain its ability when they die.
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：得知 1 名在场镇民角色。若你坚称自己是该角色，则其死亡后你获得该能力。
roles.detail: First night only. Learn one in-play Townsfolk. If later mad that you are that role, you gain the ability when that player dies.
roles.chineseDetail: 小精灵 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Poppy Grower
roles.summary: Experimental Townsfolk. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 罂粟种植者：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Townsfolk is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 罂粟种植者 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Preacher
roles.summary: Each night, choose a player: a Minion, if chosen, learns this. All chosen Minions have no ability.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名玩家。若其是爪牙，则其得知此事；所有被你选中的爪牙失去能力。
roles.detail: Each night, choose a player. If they are a Minion, they learn this and have no ability while the Preacher remains alive and healthy.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚选择一名玩家。若其是爪牙，则其会得知自己被传教士选中，并在传教士存活且能力正常时失去能力。

roles.name: Princess
roles.summary: On your 1st day, if you nominated & executed a player, the Demon doesn't kill tonight.
roles.chineseSummary: 若你在第一天提名且最终处决了该玩家，今夜恶魔不杀人。
roles.detail: If the Princess nominated the player who is executed on day 1, the Demon does not kill that night even if the executed player survives.
roles.chineseDetail: 公主 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Shugenja
roles.summary: You start knowing if your closest evil player is clockwise or counterclockwise. If equidistant, this is arbitrary.
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：得知离你最近的邪恶玩家在顺时针还是逆时针方向；若距离相同，此信息可任意。
roles.detail: First night only. Learn whether the nearest evil player is clockwise or counterclockwise from you. If equally distant, either result is valid.
roles.chineseDetail: 修验者 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Steward
roles.summary: You start knowing 1 good player.
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：得知 1 名善良玩家。
roles.detail: First night only. Learn one good player.
roles.chineseDetail: 总管 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Village Idiot
roles.summary: Each night, choose a player: you learn their alignment. You may be drunk. [+0 to +2 Village Idiots]
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名玩家，得知其阵营。你可能是醉的。[+0 到 +2 名村中傻子]
roles.detail: Each night, choose a player and learn their alignment. In games with multiple Village Idiots, some may be drunk. During setup, there may be additional Village Idiot copies.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚选择一名玩家，得知其阵营。若场上有多个村中傻子，其中部分可能醉酒。开局时可能加入额外的村中傻子副本。

roles.name: Boffin
roles.summary: The Demon gains a not-in-play good character's ability. You both know which.
roles.chineseSummary: 恶魔获得一个不在场善良角色的能力。你与恶魔都知道是哪一个。
roles.detail: At setup, grant the Demon a good-character ability that is not in play. Record it in the note field so the storyteller can apply it.
roles.chineseDetail: 博芬 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Boomdandy
roles.summary: Experimental Minion. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 爆弹狂人：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Minion is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 爆弹狂人 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Fearmonger
roles.summary: Experimental Minion. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 恐惧贩子：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Minion is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 恐惧贩子 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Goblin
roles.summary: If you publicly claim to be the Goblin when nominated & are executed that day, your team wins.
roles.chineseSummary: 若你在被提名时公开宣称自己是地精，并于当天被处决，你的阵营立刻获胜。
roles.detail: If the Goblin is nominated, publicly claims to be the Goblin, and is executed that day, evil wins immediately. Bluff claims by non-Goblins do nothing by themselves.
roles.chineseDetail: 若地精在被提名时公开宣称自己是地精，并于当天被处决，则邪恶阵营立刻获胜。其他角色假装宣称自己是地精不会自动生效。

roles.name: Harpy
roles.summary: Experimental Minion. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 鹰身女妖：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Minion is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 鹰身女妖 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Marionette
roles.summary: Experimental Minion. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 提线木偶：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Minion is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 提线木偶 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Mezepheles
roles.summary: You start knowing a secret word. The 1st good player to say it becomes evil that night.
roles.chineseSummary: 你起始知道一个秘密单词。第一位公开说出它的善良玩家会在当夜转为邪恶。
roles.detail: Record the secret word on the first night. The first good player to say it publicly becomes evil that night.
roles.chineseDetail: 梅泽菲勒斯 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Organ Grinder
roles.summary: All players keep their eyes closed when voting and the tally is secret. Each night, choose if this applies tomorrow.
roles.chineseSummary: 所有玩家投票时闭眼且不公开票数。每晚决定次日是否生效。
roles.detail: When active, voting happens in secret and the tally is not announced. Use the note field to record whether this effect is active tomorrow.
roles.chineseDetail: 风琴师 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Psychopath
roles.summary: Each day, before nominations, you may publicly choose a player: they die. If executed, you only die if you lose roshambo.
roles.chineseSummary: 每天提名前：你可以公开选择一名玩家死亡。若你被处决，只有输掉猜拳才会死亡。
roles.detail: Before nominations each day, the Psychopath may choose a player to die. If the Psychopath is executed, resolve roshambo manually if needed.
roles.chineseDetail: 精神病人 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Summoner
roles.summary: You get 3 bluffs. On the 3rd night, choose a player: they become an evil Demon of your choice. [No Demon]
roles.chineseSummary: 你获得 3 个伪装。第 3 夜：选择一名玩家，其变为你所选的邪恶恶魔。[开局无恶魔]
roles.detail: The Summoner starts with no Demon in play, gets three bluffs, and on the third night may create a Demon of their choice. Use the note field to record the Demon role.
roles.chineseDetail: 召唤师 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Vizier
roles.summary: Experimental Minion. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 维齐尔：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Minion is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 维齐尔 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Widow
roles.summary: On your 1st night, look at the Grimoire & choose a player: they are poisoned. 1 good player knows a Widow is in play.
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：查看魔典并选择一名玩家，其被持续中毒；另有 1 名善良玩家得知本局有寡妇。
roles.detail: First night only. The Widow looks at the Grimoire, poisons one chosen player, and one good player is told that a Widow is in play. The poison lasts while the Widow lives.
roles.chineseDetail: 仅首夜行动。寡妇查看魔典并选择一名玩家使其持续中毒；同时随机有 1 名善良玩家得知本局存在寡妇。只要寡妇活着，该中毒就持续。

roles.name: Wizard
roles.summary: Once per game, choose to make a wish. If granted, it might have a price and leave a clue as to its nature.
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次：许下一个愿望。若被实现，可能需要付出代价，并留下线索。
roles.detail: Record the Wizard's wish once per game and any cost or clue that the storyteller applies.
roles.chineseDetail: 巫师 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Wraith
roles.summary: Experimental Minion. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 怨灵：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Minion is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 怨灵 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Xaan
roles.summary: On night X, all Townsfolk are poisoned until dusk. [X Outsiders]
roles.chineseSummary: 在第 X 夜，所有镇民中毒直到黄昏。[X 名外来者]
roles.detail: Record the number of Outsiders in setup as X. On night X, all Townsfolk are poisoned until dusk.
roles.chineseDetail: 夏安 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Al-Hadikhia
roles.summary: Experimental Demon. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 阿尔哈迪基亚：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Demon is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 阿尔哈迪基亚 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Kazali
roles.summary: Experimental Demon. Resolve this role manually using the official wiki.
roles.chineseSummary: 卡扎利：实验角色，请参考官方 wiki 由说书人手动裁定。
roles.detail: This experimental Demon is available in the role pool, but its full ability is not automated yet. Use storyteller notes and the official wiki to resolve it.
roles.chineseDetail: 卡扎利 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Legion
roles.summary: Each night*, a player might die. Executions fail if only evil voted. You register as a Minion too. [Most players are Legion]
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：可能有一名玩家死亡。若只有邪恶玩家投票，则处决失败。你也会被登记为爪牙。[多数玩家是军团]
roles.detail: Most players become Legion. Each night the storyteller may kill a player. Executions fail if only evil players voted for the nominee.
roles.chineseDetail: 军团 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Leviathan
roles.summary: If more than 1 good player is executed, evil wins. All players know you are in play. After day 5, evil wins.
roles.chineseSummary: 若超过 1 名善良玩家被处决，邪恶立刻获胜。所有玩家都知道本局有利维坦。第 5 天后邪恶获胜。
roles.detail: All players know Leviathan is in play. If more than one good player is executed across the game, evil wins immediately. If day 5 ends with Leviathan alive, evil wins.
roles.chineseDetail: 所有玩家都知道利维坦在场。整局游戏中只要超过 1 名善良玩家被处决，邪恶立刻获胜；若第 5 天结束时利维坦仍存活，邪恶获胜。

roles.name: Lil' Monsta
roles.summary: Each night, Minions choose who babysits Lil' Monsta's token & a player might die. [+1 Minion]
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：爪牙决定谁照看小怪物，且可能有一名玩家死亡。[+1 爪牙]
roles.detail: Lil' Monsta is babysat by Minions and usually adds an extra Minion to setup. Use storyteller notes to record the babysitter and any kill each night.
roles.chineseDetail: 小怪物 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Lleech
roles.summary: Each night*, choose a player: they die. You start by choosing a host: they are poisoned. You die if and only if the host dies.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择一名玩家死亡。首夜先选择一名宿主，其在你存活时持续中毒；只有宿主死亡时你才会死亡。
roles.detail: First night: choose a host, who is poisoned while the Lleech lives. Other nights: choose a player to die. The Lleech survives any death attempt while its host is alive, and dies immediately when the host dies.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜先选择一名宿主，宿主在利奇存活期间持续中毒。之后每晚选择 1 名玩家死亡。只要宿主还活着，利奇不会死亡；宿主一死，利奇立刻死亡。

roles.name: Lord of Typhon
roles.summary: Each night*, choose a player: they die. [Evil characters are in a line. You are in the middle. +1 Minion. -? to +? Outsiders]
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名玩家死亡。[邪恶玩家连成一线，你位于中间。+1 爪牙，外来者数量不定]
roles.detail: Lord of Typhon uses a standard Demon kill, but setup adds one Minion and arranges evil players in a line around the Demon.
roles.chineseDetail: 提丰之主 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Ojo
roles.summary: Each night*, choose a character: they die. If they are not in play, the Storyteller chooses who dies.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择一个角色，其死亡；若不在场，则由说书人决定谁死亡。
roles.detail: Each night after the first, choose a character. If that character is in play, that player dies; otherwise the storyteller chooses who dies.
roles.chineseDetail: 奥霍 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。

roles.name: Riot
roles.summary: On day 3, Minions become Riot & nominees die immediately. This must happen.
roles.chineseSummary: 第 3 天开始，爪牙转变为暴乱；被提名者会立刻死亡并继续提名存活玩家，此流程必须持续。
roles.detail: Beginning on day 3, Riot transforms living Minions into Riot. During Riot day, each nominee dies immediately and nominations continue until all Riot are dead or only two players remain.
roles.chineseDetail: 从第 3 天开始，暴乱会让所有存活爪牙转变为暴乱。暴乱日中每次提名都会让被提名者立刻死亡，然后继续下一次提名，直到所有暴乱死亡或只剩 2 名存活玩家。

roles.name: Yaggababble
roles.summary: You start knowing a phrase. For each time you said it publicly today, a player might die.
roles.chineseSummary: 你起始知道一句短语。你今天每公开说出一次，今晚就可能多死一人。
roles.detail: Record the secret phrase and any victim chosen because it was said publicly that day.
roles.chineseDetail: 亚嘎巴布尔 已加入角色池，但其完整能力尚未自动化。请结合说书人备注与官方 wiki 进行结算。
